title: DROP-IN COUNSELING - 211info
text: BENTON COUNTY CRISIS CENTER DROP-IN COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers same day mental health crisis counseling services. 240 NW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 766-6767 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6767 TTY/TTD (800) 221-2832 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Sliding scale fee DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Mental Health Drop In Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS TEAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON COUNTY CRISIS CENTER
